_schema.description: Norwegian kommune registry. Reference data only; no code reads this yet. Will be consumed by Phase 3 nearest-Vinmonopolet UX via `borders`.

fields.municipality: Norwegian display name (bilingual Sami/Finnish names collapsed to Norwegian)
fields.id: ASCII slug, lowercase, matches data/municipalities/<id>.json filename when that kommune is added
fields.borders: null = kommune has a Vinmonopolet (neighbors not needed). [] = kommune has no Vinmonopolet, neighbors to be populated. ["id1","id2",...] = populated neighbor list
fields.bugs: Array of free-text notes about known issues with this entry

bugs: Offisielt navn er flerspråklig (samisk/finsk + norsk); bruker kun norsk navn her.
